title: Dashboard loads nodes and starts live telemetry
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the dashboard and see nodes rendered with live telemetry and alerts visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Verify supply chain nodes are displayed
Verify live telemetry and risk alerts are displayed

title: Sign up, log in, and land on dashboard
description: Verifies a new user can sign up and then log in to reach the authenticated dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the signup form
Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with the same newly registered email
Fill in the password field with the same newly registered password
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Log in as existing user
description: Verifies an existing user can log in and access authenticated content successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Explainability analysis renders decision explanation from a valid decision
description: Users can submit a decision for analysis and see decision tree, contributions, and confidence visualizations rendered.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Run the disruption-response workflow until a decision identifier is available in the UI
Navigate to /explainability
Select the newly created decision for analysis
Submit the explainability analysis request
Verify an explainability visualization is displayed including decision structure and confidence information

title: Open alert details from the dashboard
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open a risk alert from the dashboard and view its details for triage.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Open an alert from the alerts list or alert panel
Verify the selected alert details are displayed

title: Browse marketplace scenarios with industry filter and rating sort
description: Users can filter marketplace scenarios by industry and sort by rating and see an updated list of matching scenarios.

steps.description: Navigate to /marketplace
Select an industry filter value
Select sorting by rating
Wait for the scenarios list to finish loading
Verify a list of scenarios is displayed and reflects the selected filter and sort order

title: Open a scenario detail from marketplace listing
description: Users can open a scenario from the marketplace list and view its detail page content.

steps.description: Navigate to /marketplace
Wait for the scenarios list to finish loading
Click a scenario in the list to open its detail view
Verify the scenario detail view is displayed with scenario information

title: Reject invalid credentials on login
description: Verifies a user entering invalid login credentials is kept signed out and shown an authentication error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with invalid-user@example.com
Fill in the password field with wrong-password
Submit the login form
Verify an authentication error is visible
Verify the user remains on the login page

title: Sustainability dashboard shows aggregated KPIs and trends
description: Users can load sustainability KPIs derived from nodes and analytics and see trends and alerts displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /sustainability
Wait for sustainability data to finish loading
Verify sustainability KPI summaries are displayed
Verify sustainability trends or alerts are displayed

title: Log out ends the session
description: Verifies a logged-in user can log out and is returned to a signed-out state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the user account menu
Log out
Verify the user is in a signed-out state

title: Load interactive demo with demo scenarios and config
description: Verifies a visitor can load the landing page interactive demo and see the command center demo rendered after demo scenarios and config are loaded.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the interactive demo area to finish loading
Verify demo scenario options are displayed
Verify the interactive command center demo is displayed

title: Use search to narrow marketplace results
description: Users can search within the marketplace and see results narrowed to scenarios matching the query.

steps.description: Navigate to /marketplace
Fill "Factory disruption" into the search field
Press Enter
Wait for the scenarios list to finish loading
Verify the scenarios list updates to show fewer or equal results than before the search

title: Trigger an operational request via voice command and see results
description: Verifies a user can submit a voice command and the UI shows a resolved intent followed by an agent-backed result or action confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to the voice interface page
Select a valid sample voice input option available in the UI
Submit the voice command for processing
Verify the UI shows the recognized transcription and resolved intent details
Verify the UI shows an agent result or action confirmation related to the intent

title: View AR topology after nodes and spatial configuration load
description: Verifies the AR view loads supply chain nodes and rendering configuration and displays an AR scene with node overlays.

steps.description: Navigate to the AR visualization page
Start or enter the AR visualization experience from within the page
Verify an AR scene is displayed
Verify node overlays or topology elements are visible in the AR view

title: Explainability allows re-analyzing a decision after changing context inputs
description: Users can adjust analysis context and re-run explainability to update the displayed explanation.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Run the disruption-response workflow until a decision identifier is available in the UI
Navigate to /explainability
Select the newly created decision for analysis
Fill a valid value into an available analysis context field
Submit the explainability analysis request
Update the analysis context field to a different valid value
Submit the explainability analysis request again
Verify the explainability visualization refreshes to reflect the new analysis run

title: Sustainability dashboard supports switching KPI scope or time range
description: Users can change the KPI scope or time range and see sustainability KPIs update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /sustainability
Wait for sustainability data to finish loading
Select a different time range or scope option
Wait for sustainability data to finish loading
Verify the displayed sustainability KPIs update after the selection change

title: Clear marketplace filters and return to full results
description: Users can clear applied marketplace filters and see the broader scenario list return.

steps.description: Navigate to /marketplace
Select an industry filter value
Wait for the scenarios list to finish loading
Clear all filters
Wait for the scenarios list to finish loading
Verify the scenarios list is displayed without the previously applied filter constraints

title: Switch demo scenario in interactive demo
description: Verifies a visitor can change the selected demo scenario and the demo visualization updates accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the interactive demo area to finish loading
Select a different demo scenario from the scenario selector
Verify the demo visualization updates to reflect the newly selected scenario

title: Edit a typed command and see intent and results reflect the change
description: Verifies a user can switch to typed command entry, modify the command, and see updated intent and corresponding results.

steps.description: Navigate to the voice interface page
Switch to typed command entry mode
Fill a valid command into the typed command field
Submit the typed command for processing
Edit the typed command to a different valid command
Submit the updated typed command for processing
Verify the UI shows intent details consistent with the updated command
Verify the UI shows results consistent with the updated command

title: Explainability rejects unknown decision identifier
description: Users who provide an unknown decision identifier are prompted to select a valid decision or re-run analysis.

steps.description: Navigate to /explainability
Fill "unknown-decision-id-000" into the decision identifier field
Submit the explainability analysis request
Verify an invalid decision prompt is displayed and the user is guided to choose a valid decision or rerun the workflow

title: Adjust demo configuration controls
description: Verifies a visitor can adjust demo configuration controls and see the demo visualization respond to the new configuration.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the interactive demo area to finish loading
Adjust a demo configuration control to a different valid value
Verify the demo visualization reflects the updated configuration

title: Marketplace sorting change updates displayed order
description: Users can change the sort option and see the scenario list order update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /marketplace
Wait for the scenarios list to finish loading
Select a sort option
Wait for the scenarios list to finish loading
Select a different sort option
Wait for the scenarios list to finish loading
Verify the scenario list order changes after the second sort selection

title: Sustainability dashboard handles empty or partial emissions data gracefully
description: When some nodes lack emissions attributes, the sustainability dashboard still renders KPIs or shows a clear partial-data state.

steps.description: Navigate to /sustainability
Wait for sustainability data to finish loading
Verify the dashboard renders without blocking and shows KPIs or a partial-data notice

title: Re-run the same voice command and see the latest result update
description: Verifies a user can re-submit a voice command and the UI updates to show the latest transcription/intent and latest result.

steps.description: Navigate to the voice interface page
Select a valid sample voice input option available in the UI
Submit the voice command for processing
Submit the same voice command again
Verify the UI shows the most recent transcription/intent as the current command
Verify the UI shows a single current result state for the latest command

title: AR view supports basic exploration controls
description: Verifies a user can use in-page AR exploration controls and the AR scene responds without losing rendered topology.

steps.description: Navigate to the AR visualization page
Start or enter the AR visualization experience from within the page
Use an available in-page control to change the AR view (for example zoom, reset, or view mode)
Verify the AR scene updates in response to the control interaction
Verify node overlays remain visible after the interaction

title: Sustainability dashboard provides a refresh action to reload KPIs
description: Users can manually refresh sustainability KPIs and see the dashboard reload successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /sustainability
Wait for sustainability data to finish loading
Click the refresh action for sustainability data
Wait for sustainability data to finish loading
Verify sustainability KPI summaries are displayed after refresh

title: Navigate from landing page to sign up entry point
description: Verifies a visitor can start the onboarding journey by navigating from the landing page to the signup page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the call-to-action to create an account
Verify the user lands on the signup page

title: Marketplace empty results state for restrictive filters
description: Users see an empty state when filters/search yield no matching scenarios and can recover by clearing criteria.

steps.description: Navigate to /marketplace
Fill "zzzz-nonexistent-scenario-query" into the search field
Press Enter
Wait for the scenarios list to finish loading
Verify an empty results state is displayed

title: Handle invalid voice input by prompting for retry or typed command
description: Verifies submitting invalid voice input results in a retry prompt or an option to type a command instead.

steps.description: Navigate to the voice interface page
Select an invalid or noisy sample voice input option available in the UI
Submit the voice command for processing
Verify a transcription/voice input validation error is displayed
Verify the UI prompts the user to retry or offers a typed command alternative

title: Handle marketplace rate-limit state with user retry
description: When the marketplace is rate-limited, the UI shows a rate-limit state and allows the user to retry loading results.

steps.description: Navigate to /marketplace
Wait for a rate-limit state to appear if triggered by normal use
Click the retry action on the rate-limit state
Verify the marketplace either shows scenario results or continues to show a rate-limit state with a retry option

title: AR view shows an empty-state when no nodes are available to render
description: Verifies the AR view displays a clear empty-state instead of a broken scene when there are no nodes to visualize.

steps.description: Navigate to the AR visualization page
Use in-page controls to filter or scope the displayed nodes to none (if available)
Verify an empty-state message or placeholder is displayed for the AR visualization
Verify the AR scene does not show node overlays when no nodes are selected

title: Sustainability dashboard offline summary state is recoverable by retry
description: If sustainability data cannot be loaded, the UI shows an offline summary state and allows retry to attempt loading again.

steps.description: Navigate to /sustainability
Wait for an offline summary state to appear if triggered
Click the retry action from the offline summary state
Verify the dashboard either shows sustainability KPIs or continues to show an offline summary state with a retry option

title: Clear voice command history or session output
description: Verifies the user can clear the current voice session output and the UI returns to an empty/ready state.

steps.description: Navigate to the voice interface page
Select a valid sample voice input option available in the UI
Submit the voice command for processing
Clear the current voice conversation or results
Verify the UI returns to an empty or ready-to-record state
Verify no prior transcription or result content remains visible
